greetings.text: You have given my fallen sisters peace. Blood Raven is no more. I... I am grateful, warrior.
I am Kashya, captain of the Rogue archers. We've lost many sisters to the darkness. If you prove yourself, I can assign a Rogue scout to accompany you.

services.response: Take your pick. These sisters have lost their home, but not their will to fight. Treat them well.

questBranches.text: Blood Raven — one of our finest archers — has been corrupted. She now commands the dead in the Sisters' Burial Grounds. End her torment. Slay her.
Blood Raven still defiles the Burial Grounds. She was once a hero. Now she must be stopped.
You have freed Blood Raven from her cursed existence. She can rest now. You have my respect, and the Rogues will fight at your side.
